title: Steward configuration v0
description: Typed, non-executable configuration accepted by Steward 0.1.x. Unknown keys are rejected by default.

version.description: Mandatory configuration contract version. Quote this value in YAML.

max_file_bytes.description: Maximum bytes read from one source file. Any mathematically integral JSON number representation is accepted. Default: 1048576.

max_history_commits.description: Maximum history depth. Any mathematically integral JSON number representation is accepted. Default: 10000.

output.description: Presentation-only defaults; these fields do not change semantic findings.

format.description: Default future scan renderer. Default: terminal.

policy.description: Phase 1 policy is advisory. Typed blocking policy arrives in its planned product phase.
